user.description: Making AI simple 🤖 | Threads, tools & real-world use cases | Helping you stay ahead in tech. DM for paid promo : collab.shopia@gmail.com

tweets.text:
Most people are paying for multiple AI tools…

But still using the wrong one for the wrong task.

ChatGPT.
Gemini.
Claude.
Grok.
Perplexity.

They’re not competitors they’re different tools built for different strengths.

Some are better for deep research.
Some for writing.
Some https://t.co/uhuG4vPyAk
